functions.name: test_extract_with_trafilatura_returns_result
functions.docstring: Extraction should return an ExtractionResult with method=trafilatura on success.

functions.name: test_extract_with_trafilatura_fetch_failure
functions.docstring: When fetch returns None, result should be failed.

functions.name: test_extract_with_trafilatura_empty_url
functions.docstring: Empty URL should return a failed result.

functions.name: test_extract_from_html
functions.docstring: Direct HTML extraction should work without network.

functions.name: test_extract_from_html_empty
functions.docstring: Empty HTML should return a failed result.

functions.name: test_hybrid_extract_uses_trafilatura_first
functions.docstring: Hybrid should try trafilatura before playwright.

functions.name: test_hybrid_extract_no_input
functions.docstring: Hybrid with no url or html should return failed.

functions.name: test_extract_batch_async
functions.docstring: Batch extraction should return results for each URL.
